@@ -233,0 +237,2 @@

+                                                size_t predicted_peak_humongous_allocated,
@@ -244,0 +250,2 @@
+    evt.set_predictedNonHumAllocationRate(predicted_old_non_hum_alloc_rate);
+    evt.set_peakHumongousAllocation(predicted_peak_humongous_allocated);

@@ -64,0 +64,2 @@

@@ -519,0 +519,4 @@
